ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trail */,
  "route" TEXT /* Name of the hiking route */,
  "route_variation" TEXT /* Variation of the route (e.g., one way, loop) */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of hiking (e.g., supported, self-supported) */,
  "average_time" TEXT /* Average time taken to complete the trail */,
  "date_established" TEXT /* Date when the trail was established or last updated */,
  "elevation_gain" INTEGER /* Total elevation gain of the trail */,
  "starting_point" TEXT /* Starting point of the trail */,
  "end_point" TEXT /* Endpoint of the trail */,
  "distance" REAL /* Total distance of the trail in kilometers */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the trail (e.g., easy, moderate, hard) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status of the trail (e.g., good, needs repair) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "trails_image" TEXT /* URL or path to an image of the trail */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hiker, guide, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile image */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography or about section for the user */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name and contact information of an emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hikes" (
  "hike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hike record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who completed the hike */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail that was hiked */,
  "date_hiked" TEXT /* Date when the hike occurred */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the hike (e.g., time taken to complete) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User's rating of the trail (1 to 5 stars) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the hike */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the hike */,
  "group_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the hiking group */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Weather and trail conditions during the hike */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the hike */,
  "total_distance_hiked" REAL /* Total distance hiked by the user on that day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hikes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hikes_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "rating_breakdown" TEXT /* Breakdown of the rating (e.g., trail condition, scenery, difficulty) */,
  "photos" TEXT /* List of URLs or paths to photos submitted with the review */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the review has been approved by an admin */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_reviews_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the category entails */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL or path to an icon representing the category */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for the category (for visual representation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping entry */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail being categorized */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category assigned to the trail */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority order in which categories should be displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES trail_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_category_mapping_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaged in the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., hike, review) */,
  "activity_id_ref" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the activity (hike_id or review_id) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_activity_id_ref FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id_ref") REFERENCES hikes ("hike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics record */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail for which statistics are recorded */,
  "hike_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the trail has been hiked */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the trail from user reviews */,
  "total_distance_hiked" REAL /* Total distance hiked on the trail */,
  "average_group_size" REAL /* Average group size for hikes on the trail */,
  "total_photos" INTEGER /* Total number of photos submitted for the trail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_statistics_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., trail update, new trail) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_logs" (
  "admin_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin action log */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was logged */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the administrative action */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
